methods.name: spaceone.dashboard.service.custom_widget_service.CustomWidgetService.create
documentation:
Register widget

Args:
    params (dict): {
        'widget_name': 'str',
        'title': 'str',
        'options': 'dict',
        'settings': 'dict',
        'inherit_options': 'dict',
        'labels': 'list',
        'tags': 'dict',
        'domain_id': 'str'
    }

Returns:
    custom_widget_vo (object)

documentation:
Deregister widget
